2604.25472.title: SciEval: A Benchmark for Automatic Evaluation of K-12 Science Instructional Materials
2604.25472.paper_summary: The need to evaluate instructional materials for K-12 science education has become increasingly important, as more educators use generative AI to create instructional materials. However, the review of instructional materials is time-consuming, expertise-intensive, and difficult to scale, motivating interest in automated evaluation approaches. While large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on general evaluation tasks, their performance and reliability on instructional materials remain unclear. To address this gap, we formulate Automatic Instructional Materials Evaluation (AIME) as a generative AI task that predicts scores and evidence using the rubric designed by the educator. We create a benchmark dataset and develop baseline models for AIME. First, we curate the first AIME dataset, SciEval, consisting of instructional materials annotated with pedagogy-aligned evaluation scores and evidence-based rationales. Expert annotations achieve high inter-rater reliability, resulting in a dataset of 273 lesson-level instructional materials evaluated across 13 criteria (N=3549) using the EQuIP rubric. Second, we test mainstream LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Llama, and Qwen) on SciEval and find that none achieve strong performance. Then we fine-tune Qwen3 on SciEval. Results on a held-out test set show that domain-aligned fine-tuning can achieve up to 11 percent performance gains, highlighting the importance of domain-specific fine-tuning for AIME and facilitating the use of LLMs in other educational tasks.
2604.25472.paper_summary_zh: 評估K-12科學教育的教學材料的需求變得越來越重要，因為越來越多的教育工作者使用生成式AI來創建教學材料。<lb/>然而，對教學材料的審查是耗時的、需要專業知識的，並且難以擴展，這促使了對自動評估方法的興趣。<lb/>雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在一般評估任務上表現良好，但它們在教學材料上的表現和可靠性仍然不明確。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們將自動教學材料評估（AIME）定義為一個生成式AI任務，該任務使用教育者設計的評分標準來預測分數和證據。<lb/>我們創建了一個基準數據集並開發了AIME的基線模型。<lb/>首先，我們策劃了第一個AIME數據集SciEval，該數據集由與教學法對齊的評估分數和基於證據的理由註釋的教學材料組成。<lb/>專家註釋達到了高的一致性，形成了一個包含273個課程級教學材料的數據集，這些材料在使用EQuIP評分標準的13個標準下進行評估（N=3549）。<lb/>其次，我們在SciEval上測試主流的LLMs（GPT、Gemini、Llama和Qwen），發現沒有一個達到良好的表現。<lb/>然後，我們在SciEval上對Qwen3進行了微調。<lb/>在保留的測試集上的結果顯示，領域對齊的微調可以實現高達11%的性能增益，突顯了領域特定微調對AIME的重要性，並促進了LLMs在其他教育任務中的應用。
2604.25472.author: Zhaohui Li et.al.
2604.25472.authors: Zhaohui Li, Peng He, Zhiyuan Chen, Honglu Liu, Zeyuan Wang, Tingting Li, Jinjun Xiong
